examples.title: Simple Graphics Pipeline Stage Processing
examples.description: Demonstrates the four major tasks: modeling transformation, geometric processing (clipping/projection), rasterization, and fragment processing with color/texture output
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates all four major graphics pipeline tasks: (1) Modeling creates geometric representation as vertices; (2) Geometric Processing applies model/view/projection transforms, clips primitives against frustum, performs perspective division, and viewport transform; (3) Rasterization uses barycentric coordinates to determine which pixels are inside the triangle and interpolates attributes; (4) Fragment Processing performs depth testing, texture sampling, lighting, blending, and writes final color to framebuffer
examples.timeComplexity: O(n × m) where n = triangle pixels, m = pipeline stages

examples.title: Scan Line Rasterization of a Triangle
examples.description: Demonstrates Task 3 (Rasterization) using scanline algorithm to convert triangle geometry into fragments/pixels
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the scanline rasterization algorithm which is a core part of Task 3 (Rasterization) in the graphics pipeline. The algorithm: (1) Sorts vertices by Y coordinate; (2) Creates edges between vertices; (3) For each scan line (horizontal row), finds where edges intersect; (4) Fills all pixels between the two intersection points using interpolation; (5) Interpolates depth, color, and texture coordinates across the triangle for each fragment. The resulting fragments are stored in the framebuffer and passed to the next stage (Task 4: Fragment Processing) for depth testing, texturing, and final color output.
examples.timeComplexity: O(width × height) per triangle, bounded by triangle area
